posts.text:
At a minimum this needs to happen.


Rob Sanchez Jr (@Cubanbob)

All property that the Cuban government confiscated back in the 60’s have to be returned to its owners before we make any deal with Cuba

Nora Gámez Torres (@ngameztorres)

#Scoop #Cuba is expected to announce as early as next week economic reforms to allow Cuban Americans living in South Florida and elsewhere in the U.S. and around the world to invest and own private businesses on the island.

posts.text:
There are lies, damned lies and statistics.

Then there is whatever you’d call the claim that California has lower taxes than Florida.

Even people who like California governance acknowledge CA is a very high tax state: highest sales, income and gas taxes in the nation.


Tom Bevan (@TomBevanRCP)

This is just a blatant, verifiable falsehood. Here's a Wallethub 2025 analysis of the overall tax burden by state: 

California is 4th highest. 
Texas is 40th.
Florida is 45th.

nitter.net/GavinNewsom/

Tom Bevan (@TomBevanRCP)

T

posts.text:
Florida has led on election integrity for years — banning ballot harvesting, eliminating Zuckerbucks, creating a state office to prosecute voter fraud, among other initiatives — and now we will be enacting the Florida SAVE Act to further bolster our nation-leading efforts.
